creator: asmodai@wxs.nl
text:
Hi,

I saw your report of the ext2fs giving some messages after deleting a lot
of files. I have used ext2fs as well in circumstances and haven't noticed
this behaviour.

However my version was either 3.x or 4.x, can you try a recent 2.2.x or 3.x
and comment whether or not this problem is still present?

If I won't hear from you in about 1 - 2 weeks I will ask if this pr can be
closed because it is getting stale.

With regards,

-- 
Jeroen Ruigrok van der Werven                asmodai(at)wxs.nl
        The *BSD Programmer's Documentation Project 
Network/Security Specialist      <http://home.wxs.nl/~asmodai>
*BSD: We are back and will not accept no...
